project.title: Coffee Commercial Demo
project.role_card: Premium coffee brand voice: warm, concise, calm.

storyboard_text:
分镜规划信息 (Storyboard Planning)
音频总时长： 12 秒
预计常规图片总数： 2 张
预计关键节点数： 1 个
预计分批次数： 1 批
每批 3 张
以下是 第 1 批（第 1 张 — 第 3 张） 的定格动画分镜提示词：
————————————————————————
第 1 张图片 ▏时间：0:00 — 0:04 ▏模式：B（全新构图）
台词：Fresh coffee, fresh morning. / Fresh coffee, fresh morning.
--- 提示词 ---
STYLE LOCK: premium commercial photography.
Scene: Warm kitchen counter, ceramic cup, morning light, steam rising from black coffee.
Mood & Color: Golden morning highlights, calm and inviting.
————————————————————————
第 2 张图片 ▏时间：0:04 — 0:08 ▏⚡ 关键节点 ⚡
节点类型：[产品动作]
画面风格：[macro product commercial]
输出形式：直接图生视频
台词：Roasted rich, poured smooth. / Roasted rich, poured smooth.
--- 提示词 ---
STYLE LOCK: premium macro coffee commercial.
Scene: Close macro shot of coffee beans beside a glass pour-over brewer.
--- 图生视频提示词 (I2V) ---
Subject Motion: Coffee pours into a glass server, rich amber stream.
Camera: Gentle camera drift with shallow depth of field.
————————————————————————
第 3 张图片 ▏时间：0:08 — 0:12 ▏模式：B（全新构图）
台词：Your quiet ritual, ready now. / Your quiet ritual, ready now.
--- 提示词 ---
STYLE LOCK: clean premium commercial composition.
Scene: Finished cup beside notebook and spoon, subtle steam movement, calm end-card hold.
Mood & Color: Soft neutral background, warm coffee tones.

shots.image_prompt: Warm kitchen counter, ceramic cup, morning light, steam rising from black coffee.
shots.i2v_prompt: Slow push-in toward steaming cup, soft morning highlights.

shots.image_prompt: Close macro shot of coffee beans beside a glass pour-over brewer.
shots.i2v_prompt: Coffee pours into a glass server, rich amber stream, gentle camera drift.

shots.image_prompt: Finished cup beside notebook and spoon, clean premium commercial composition.
shots.i2v_prompt: Subtle steam movement, calm end-card hold.
